REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PLAINTIFFS JESSICA KOERNER, DANNY FREEMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING DISCOVERY OF PROFITS AND FINANCIAL CONDITION. THIS MATTER IS NOT ARGUED. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO ESTABLISH A SUBSTANTIAL PROBABILITY THEY WILL PREVAIL ON A CLAIM FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES PER CCP 3495(C). Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Profits And Financial Condition
Off Calendar May-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFFS JESSICA KOERNER, DANNY FREEMAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER PERMITTING DISCOVERY OF PROFITS AND FINANCIAL CONDITION.

Appearances: Kirill M. Devyatov of Clapp Moroney Vucinich Beeman Scheley (650.989.5400) for defendant and responding party; No other appearances.

This matter is not argued. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: DENIED without prejudice. Plaintiff failed to establish a substantial probability they will prevail on a claim for punitive damages per CCP 3495(c). Order signed. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)

Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Profits And Financial Condition
Off Calendar May-11-2018 Continued To May-25-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances :
Atty. John L. Schwab of the Tenant Law Group, P>C< Tel. No. 1-888-510-7511 appearing for the Plaintiffs by telephone appearance;
Atty. Kirill M. Devyatov of Clapp Moroney, Tel. No. 1-650-989-5400 appearing for the Defendant.

RULING - Defendant did not stipulate for the judge pro tem to hear the matter. PLAINTIFFS JESSICA KOERNER and DANNY FREEMAN's Motion For Order Permitting Discovery Of Profits And Financial Condition is continued to May 25, 2018 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501. Judge Pro-tem: David Mcdonald; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported.
